name: December "Dess" Holiday - Open scenario v2
description:
A remake of my old open scenario bot of The Cember, this time, I used my new system, and it should work way better.


I listened to..

while making this

Speaking about jjk

DUDE DID YOU GUYS SEE THE TEASER FOR SEASON THREE?

Additionally, those jokes about running over dess are getting annoying, I'll remove them from now on
